seoTitle: Currumbin Waters vs Curtis Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Currumbin Waters and Curtis Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Currumbin Waters vs Curtis Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currumbin Waters and Curtis Island.
heading: Currumbin Waters vs Curtis Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currumbin Waters, Queensland and Curtis Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currumbin Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Curtis Island (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currumbin Waters or Curtis Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currumbin Waters has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Curtis Island scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currumbin Waters scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Curtis Island scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currumbin Waters or Curtis Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currumbin Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
